D2 Vision L6 Create Reference

Blobs, Stripes & Streams

toggle a processing stream and watch colour, form, and motion split across V1 blobs and V2 stripes

Cytochrome-oxidase blobs in V1 and thin/pale/thick stripes in V2 sort vision into partly separate channels for colour, form, and motion before they reach V4 and MT.

Toggle a stream and follow the lit path: colour runs through the blobs and thin stripes to V4, form through interblobs and pale stripes, motion through layer 4B and thick stripes to MT.
